analysis.reasoning: Core message: Trust WHO and scientific experts over 'habitual liars'; promote fact-based assessments; propose an international experts’ investigation trip to the US. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Implicitly labels some actors as 'habitual liars' and suggests scrutiny of the US via an investigation trip, casting the US/West as untrustworthy; this aligns with portraying the West (primarily the US) negatively. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – No mention of China’s cooperative international role or support for multilateralism from China specifically; not supported. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) – No discussion of China’s domestic political system or values. CH5 (The government of the CCP succeeds) – No claims about Chinese governance performance. CH6 (China culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1.
